guard_notes.guard2: TypeScript codebase; the Go nil-guard anti-pattern grep does not apply. No optional-dependency guards that would make real connections skippable were introduced.
guard_notes.guard3: All acceptance tests spawn the real server via tsx (same code path as make serve) with a real temp vault; no MOCK/DRY_RUN/in-memory fake anywhere in tests/.
guard_notes.guard4: no story claims a priority_rule 9 exception
guard_notes.guard5: AC couplings verified by grep: search->Fuse (packages/server/src/noteIndex.ts imports fuse.js), watch->chokidar (packages/server/src/watcher.ts imports chokidar), write APIs->index (indexSyncMiddleware wired in app.ts), backlinks->resolveLinkTarget (noteIndex.backlinks).
guard_notes.guard6: git diff main...HEAD grep for TODO.*Phase / Sprint.*で実装 deferred comments: no hits.
guard_notes.guard7: docs/DESIGN/ does not exist; no ADRs to check
guard_notes.guard8_rationale: n/a — Hydra-specific data-path directories (internal/, cmd/) do not exist in this project; this sprint is read-only index code that never writes vault files (verified by [AC-S31ba00-2-2] pure-markdown byte-identity test)
guard_notes.empty_catch_note: Three new catch blocks in noteIndex.ts are not swallowed errors: each implements a defined fallback (missing dir -> skip subtree, vault-escape -> refuse to read, missing file -> remove from index) per priority 6 (index is disposable, files are truth). indexSync/watcher failures are logged to stderr, not silenced.
